name: An RFC callback DS12N RJCR is successfully received and RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL
description:
Test RFC callback DS12N with RJCR status.

Flow:
1. Get debtor service provider token
2. Activate payer to get fiscal code
3. Get creditor service provider token
4. Send an RTP
5. Cancel the RTP (RFC - Request for Cancellation)
6. Send DS12N callback with CxlStsId RJCR (Rejected Cancellation Request)
7. Verify callback is accepted (200)
8. Verify RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL
descriptionHtml:
Test RFC callback DS12N with RJCR status.

Flow:

  1. Get debtor service provider token
  2. Activate payer to get fiscal code
  3. Get creditor service provider token
  4. Send an RTP
  5. Cancel the RTP (RFC - Request for Cancellation)
  6. Send DS12N callback with CxlStsId RJCR (Rejected Cancellation Request)
  7. Verify callback is accepted (200)
  8. Verify RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL

    @allure.epic('RTP Callback')
    @allure.feature('RTP Callback DS_12N')
    @allure.story('Service provider sends an RFC callback with RJCR status')
    @allure.title('An RFC callback DS12N RJCR is successfully received and RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL')
    @allure.tag('functional', 'happy_path', 'rtp_callback', 'ds_12n_rjcr_compliant', 'rfc')
    @pytest.mark.callback
    @pytest.mark.happy_path
    def test_receive_rfc_callback_DS_12N_RJCR_compliant(
        debtor_service_provider_token_a,
        creditor_service_provider_token_a,
        rtp_reader_access_token,
        debtor_sp_mock_cert_key,
    ):
        """
        Test RFC callback DS12N with RJCR status.
    
        Flow:
        1. Get debtor service provider token
        2. Activate payer to get fiscal code
        3. Get creditor service provider token
        4. Send an RTP
        5. Cancel the RTP (RFC - Request for Cancellation)
        6. Send DS12N callback with CxlStsId RJCR (Rejected Cancellation Request)
        7. Verify callback is accepted (200)
        8. Verify RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL
        """
    
        rtp_data = generate_rtp_data()
    
        activation_response = activate(
            debtor_service_provider_token_a,
            rtp_data['payer']['payerId'],
            secrets.debtor_service_provider.service_provider_id,
        )
>       assert activation_response.status_code == 201
E       assert 503 == 201
E        +  where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
